falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically saw shallow drawdowns with 4950 as structural support; a breach invalidates the fractal similarity and suggests a deeper corrective phase than the pattern implies

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 28 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom was characterized by VIX compression below 25 as fear receded; sustained elevation above 28 indicates panic dynamics inconsistent with the pattern's stabilization thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >15bps from current level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern coincided with curve steepening as growth expectations recovered; deeper inversion signals recession pricing that contradicts the cyclical rebound embedded in the 79% pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
